# MeetingMind robots.txt
# Edit notes:
#   - Sitemap is now generated by content/ (Astro) — references the index.
#   - Explicit Allow blocks for LLM crawlers signal intent (defaults are
#     already permissive; this is for clarity and future-proofing).

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# --- LLM / generative-search crawlers (explicit allow) ---

User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

User-agent: Amazonbot
Allow: /
